---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What weakness or gap are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Keep it narrow and concrete.

## Why it matters

How does this improve:
- source quality
- trustworthiness
- freshness
- demo value

## Evidence or references

Links, screenshots, or examples.
